text: I feel a sense of quiet curiosity, standing before this R+D display. The aesthetic of the space—clean glass, bright lighting, organized exhibits—evokes a mingling of anticipation and contemplation. Words about care, growth, and possibility tug gently at my thoughts. I feel a pull towards reflection: this place is built for inquiry and experimentation, for planting ideas and cultivating optimism. Here, within these structured walls, I am reminded of the constant dance between structure and the creative imagination.
